dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates a robust governance flow, starting with a dedicated rules-context-loader followed by an alignment-engine. Schema validation was successful for all governance steps, indicating strict adherence to the defined architectural constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The agent followed a logical multi-step inference chain, mapping work to architectural evolution before generating intent. This sequential processing of context into actionable intent shows high-depth causal reasoning.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The presence of the alignment-engine and evolution-map steps indicates the structural capacity to surface tensions between immediate work and long-term architectural health, though the specific resolution of trade-offs is inferred via successful intent generation.
